summary: Lead accepted SIM-004 after validating the writer REVIEW handoff, QA REQUEST_CHANGES handoff, writer formatting-fix handoff, and final QA ACCEPT handoff. Integration gates passed for targeted formatting, sim-core tests, deterministic canary, architecture guard, typecheck, lint, full tests, task validation, JSON parsing, thread registry duplicate checks, and route evidence. SIM-004 remains ACCEPTED rather than CLOSED until the implementation PR enters main.

tests_run.result: Final QA ACCEPT handoff is valid.

tests_run.command: pnpm exec prettier --check docs/decisions/ADR-009-deterministic-rng-domains.md packages/protocol/src/index.ts packages/sim-core/src/index.ts packages/sim-core/src/deterministic-rng.ts tests/sim-core-deterministic-rng.test.ts tests/fixtures/deterministic-rng-worker.ts tests/architecture-authority-randomness.test.ts tools/architecture/check-boundaries.mjs
tests_run.result: All explicitly checked SIM-004 touched files use Prettier code style.
SIM-004 is ACCEPTED; SIM-001 and SIM-002 are CLOSED.
With SIM-004 ACCEPTED on this branch, dependency-ready draft tasks are SIM-003 and SIM-006.
Vitest passed 3 files / 21 tests, including SIM-004 RNG tests.
Node hash 61e0ba1c matched Worker-compatible hash 61e0ba1c for 30 days.
Architecture boundaries passed; self-test fixture produced 15 expected violations.
All workspace package typecheck scripts passed.
ESLint completed with no reported violations.
architecture:check, sim:determinism, root Vitest 5 files / 24 tests, and web Vitest 1 file / 3 tests passed.
format:check, lint, typecheck, and architecture:check passed.
All 12 workspace projects were already up to date; lockfile integrity passed.
Active SIM-004 writer/QA thread IDs were present before closure and duplicateThreadIds was empty.
SIM-004 spawn_agent route and all three send_input routes recorded exit_code 0 with real target thread IDs and submission IDs.

decisions: Accept SIM-004 because independent QA returned ACCEPT and lead integration gates passed.
Keep SIM-004 at ACCEPTED until this branch is merged into main; CLOSED requires actual main integration.
Do not start SIM-003 or SIM-006 before SIM-004 implementation PR is integrated and main is reconciled.
Track the root pnpm format:check package-source coverage gap as a non-blocking follow-up risk; SIM-004 direct touched-file Prettier checks passed.
risks: Root pnpm format:check still omits packages/sim-core and packages/protocol globs; targeted SIM-004 Prettier checks mitigate this task, but a follow-up task should close the general false-negative.
Worker-compatible RNG coverage uses Node worker_threads with --experimental-strip-types, matching current M0/M1 testing level rather than a browser Dedicated Worker bootstrap.
requested_action: Create the SIM-004 implementation commit and PR, wait for checks, merge only after gates pass, then reconcile main and close SIM-004 in a separate integration-closure step.
